headline: The Seven-Year Lock: How Jack Henry Turned Switching Costs into a Compounding Machine
summary: Core banking contracts running seven years with automatic price escalators have driven Jack Henry's return on invested capital from 13% in 2020 to 23% today, without acquisitions or leverage.
